response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but their profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. C++ experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments (~7 months in 2014–2015) and a thesis project, far short of the required 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++. Database experience centers on MongoDB/MySQL rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and there is no fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain exposure — RIDE Capital was retail-investment fintech built on Node/TypeScript, not investment banking systems.
strengths: Broad, senior-level engineering experience across web, backend, and systems programming
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, and open-source contributions
concerns: C++ experience is brief and dated (~2014–2015), nowhere near the required 5–10 years on Windows
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; primary databases are MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals and performance systems background
